calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award; Index
Off Calendar May-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND CARPENTERS LOCAL UNION NO. 46 AND CARPENTERS FUNDS ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. (PRINCIPAL - $8,072.82) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB
